Headline: #44 Wallace-Racine Temporary Reroute at 77th/Racine
ShortDescription: 44 Wallace-Racine buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near 77th/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#44 Wallace-Racine buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Racine, 76th, Loomis, 87th, Racine and over regular route, due to police activity near 77th/Racine.

Allow extra travel time.
